---
title: |
  Muslim Bias in Europe
subtitle: |
  Evidence from Conjoint Experiments
abstract: |
  We reanalyize data
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  eval: true
  include: true
draft: true
draft-mode: visible
---

## Introduction {#sec-introduction}

## Theory {#sec-theory}

## Research Design {#sec-design}

Data by @hahm2024divided.

{{< embed code/01_test.qmd#fig-test >}}

## Empirical Analysis {#sec-analysis}

## Conclusion {#sec-conclusion}

\singlespacing

## References

::: {#refs}
:::

## Appendix {.appendix}
